name: Color Loom Puzzle
description: Color Loom Puzzle is a vibrant and engaging puzzle game where colorful threads descend through multiple columns, waiting to be completed. Match each thread with the correct spool of the same color to fill it and clear objectives. With limited spool slots available, every move matters. Plan ahead, manage your space wisely, and complete all required threads to overcome challenging levels. Test your strategy, organization, and puzzle-solving skills as you weave your way through increasingly complex challenges.
instructions: Colored threads descend through three columns Match threads with the correct colored spools Complete the required number of threads to clear the level Spool slots are limited so plan carefully Use strategy to finish all objectives
